title: Directory Listing Enabled - Information Disclosure
description: Apache web server has directory listing enabled, exposing sensitive file and directory structure. Discovered directories include /chat/, /drupal/, /payroll_app.php, /phpmyadmin/, and /uploads/. This allows attackers to enumerate application structure and find sensitive files.
remediation: Disable directory listing in Apache configuration by setting 'Options -Indexes' in the relevant Directory directive.
